title: apium biternatum
intro: Apium biternatum, also known as Wild Celery or Earth Celery, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Apium biternatum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting digestive health. Apium biternatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be used in salads or as a vegetable.
